expected_effect: Prevent recurring protocol_drift issues by providing automated data integrity validation before solidify
rationale: Multiple optimize cycles consumed fixing chronological order, intent mismatches, and signal pollution in evolution data. An automated linter prevents these at source rather than fixing after the fact.

preconditions: recurring protocol_drift issues from data integrity problems
strategy: Parse evolution_narrative.md entries with line numbers
Validate chronological order, intent-gene consistency, signal cleanliness
Check gene reference integrity against genes.json
Output structured report with fix suggestions
validation: node -e "const s = require(process.env.HOME+'/.claude/skills/evo-lint'); s.main().then(r => console.log('issues:', r.totalIssues, 'clean:', r.clean))"

summary: Created evo-lint skill that validates evolution data integrity (chronological order, intent-gene consistency, signal pollution, gene references, duplicates), addressing root cause of recurring protocol_drift optimize cycles
